title: News Article
description: Structured news article for LLM pipelines and media monitoring.

subheadline.description: Secondary headline or deck of the article.

author_url.description: URL to the author's profile or bio page.

publication_name.description: Name of the publication or outlet.

published_at.description: ISO 8601 datetime when the article was first published.

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 datetime when the article was last updated.

canonical_url.description: Canonical URL as declared by the article page.

body_text.description: Full body text of the article.

summary.description: Short summary or abstract of the article.

word_count.description: Approximate word count of the article body.

language.description: BCP-47 language code of the article (e.g., 'en').

section.description: Publication section or category the article appears in.

tags.description: List of tags or topic labels applied to the article.

entities_mentioned.description: Named entities mentioned in the article.

paywall.description: Whether the article is behind a paywall.

image_url.description: URL to the article's featured image.

page_title.description: Title of the source page. Tabstack auto-fills this from page metadata when left empty.

favicon.description: Favicon URL of the source page. Tabstack auto-fills this from page metadata when left empty.

EntityMention.description: A named entity referenced in the article.

url.description: Optional URL associated with the entity.
